# proxifly-like mixed proxy list fixture
# blank lines, comments, duplicates, bare auth lines, and mixed schemes

72.49.49.11:31034
66.42.224.229:41679

# duplicate bare line should be deduped at source entry extraction stage
72.49.49.11:31034

socks4://legacy@192.111.139.163:4145#legacy-us
http://user:pass@8.210.17.35:3128#http-sg
http://198.199.86.11:8080#http-open
socks5://guest:pass@98.178.72.21:10919#socks5-auth

# bare auth line should still default to socks5
user2:pass2@203.0.113.10:1080#bare-auth

# duplicate explicit line should be deduped
http://198.199.86.11:8080#http-open
